column1:
Category: AI Marketing

Priority: High

One Sentence Summary: ChatGPT's citation method has been updated following the introduction of GPT-5.5, potentially impacting how users perceive and trust AI-generated information and the way content creators are credited.

Marketing Recommendation: Marketers should monitor how the new citation method affects user engagement with ChatGPT-generated content, and explore strategies to leverage or adapt to this change in content creation and attribution for their own marketing efforts.
